todayData.markdown:
# Your daily briefing — 2026-05-27 (Wednesday)

> **Start here every morning.** Checkboxes are for you in Cursor/GitHub — nothing sends without you.

---

## Do today (you)

- [ ] **Your note:** Zero cold DMs to high-inbox founders this week
- [ ] **Your note:** Nas / marketer partner: one touch if Thursday task not done yet
- [ ] **Today’s route (Wednesday):** **One intro ask** (email or DM to a mutual): “Who’s the ONE person I should talk to for distribution / partnerships?” Not a blast.
- [ ] **LinkedIn comment** (paste manually): `docs/bureau/daily/latest-news.md` → article *Developing A Truly Global RTK Network - Inside GNSS*
- [ ] **Optional social — deltas moved:** Geodnet, WeatherXM, Hivemapper → `docs/bureau/daily/latest-delta-posts.md`
- [ ] **Optional timeline post:** pick one draft in `docs/bureau/daily/latest-posts.md` (sample read or verify-device).
- [ ] **North star:** any inbound “run this on our data?” — reply same day (this is the win, not DMs sent).

---

## Do not do (wait rules)

- **Mike Horton** (Geodnet founder): No @Mike threads. If he accepts LI, DM CSV offer only
- **Manolis Nikiforakis** (WeatherXM CEO): No third ping ~1 week
- **Raziel Tabib** (Angel / devtools): Bump only after 7 days silent

---

## This week’s route (not cold DMs)

**North star:** Network teams reply: "Can you run this on our data?"

**Today (Wednesday) — Intro ask:** One intro ask (email or DM to a mutual): “Who’s the ONE person I should talk to for distribution / partnerships?” Not a blast.

**Guardrails:**
- No cold DMs to founders who get thousands of messages
- No “pick your brain” — offer one reproducible insight or ask for one intro
- Warm leads: follow gtm-context wait rules (no @Mike, no third ping Manolis, Raziel 7-day bump)
- Email beats cold DM when you have one specific hook
- Win = “can you run this on our data?” — not APK installs or adapter count


---

## Already automated (GitHub Actions)

| Job | When (UTC) | What ran | Your part |
|-----|------------|----------|-------------|
| **Daily ops sheet** | 08:00 UTC daily | Brief, posts, ops calendar, outreach queue | Read Do today |
| **News scan + LLM** | 09:00 UTC daily | latest-news.md | Paste LinkedIn comment if drafted |
| **Weekly scans** | Monday 14:00 UTC | Reports, snapshots, outreach drafts | Review when stale |
| **Last full pipeline** | 2026-05-25 15:14Z | bureau-pipeline.json | — |
| **Last news run** | 2026-05-27 10:02Z | latest-news.md | — |
| **X auto-post** | — | Off unless BUREAU_AUTO_POST + X keys | You post manually |
| **Email / LinkedIn DMs** | — | Never automated | You send |

**Next weekly scan:** ~5 day(s) (Monday 14:00 UTC) unless you run `npm run bureau:weekly` locally.

---

## Numbers at a glance

- Geodnet: 9 exact dup (lat,lng) groups, ~19,686 public stations (was 10)
- WeatherXM: 288 cells over designed capacity
- Hivemapper: top-20 visible SPL ≈ 49% of UI HONEY supply


**News pick** (0h ago): Developing A Truly Global RTK Network - Inside GNSS → `docs/bureau/daily/latest-news.md`


---

## Network health (from last scan)

- **Geodnet** — report 0h ago · exact dup groups: -1 (-11.1%)
- **WeatherXM** — report 0h ago · over-capacity cells: +1 (+0.3%)
- **Hivemapper** — report 0h ago · top-20 HONEY share: +0.00 pp (+0.0%)
- **Nodle** — report 0h ago
- **Dawn Network** — report 0h ago

---

## Open these files

2026-05-27.newsMarkdown:
# Bureau news — 2026-05-27

> **Review before posting.** Auto-post only runs when `BUREAU_AUTO_POST=true` and X API keys are set.

## Top pick

**Developing A Truly Global RTK Network - Inside GNSS**
- URL: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibkFVX3lxTE1FdS1xdjFYRENCVWNHNUpNQ250YWJ6aVEwaXNadzdlZ3ZnZTVrbXh4ekVXUlZHOUNPanVfMFpWemdXY0lzQ0tQZGxwZHNyX3lULVNhM0F5bXFlVXFDQnVUQkxaOVNLNE5YMWhBUzNn?oc=5
- Score: 55
- Networks: —
- LLM action: comment (confidence 0.9)

Model: gpt-5

### LinkedIn comment (paste on article/post)

```
Global RTK at scale rises or falls on registry hygiene as much as reference frames. In our latest public read, we see 9 exact (lat,lng) duplicate groups across ~19,686 published base stations — not a fraud claim, just a housekeeping item that can skew coverage/uptime stats if left unreviewed. Tying registry entries to signed device evidence and running a second read that flags same-coordinate clusters keeps centimeter-grade claims reproducible. Sample reads + method: https://getkinetik.app/audits.html
```

Internal: Paste under Inside GNSS/RTK threads if available. No @Mike. If Geodnet folks engage, offer a private second read on their registry CSV.

---

chatContext:
# GETKINETIK bureau ops context (for assistant)

Today (UTC): 2026-05-27

## GTM brain
# GETKINETIK GTM brain (loaded into news AI every run)

> Edit this file when outreach state changes. The news automation reads it daily.

## Mission (90-day win)

Network teams reply with: **"Can you run this on our data?"** — not APK downloads, not adapter count.

## Outreach route (weekly — NOT cold founder DMs)

Default motion: **public work + comments + intros + marketing partners** — not blasting founders who never open DMs.

| Day (UTC) | One action |
|-----------|------------|
| Mon | Post one audit delta or sample read (inbound pull) |
| Tue | One thoughtful comment on a target post/article |
| Wed | One intro ask (“who’s the ONE person for distribution?”) |
| Thu | Marketing lane: micro-creator, Nas/community partner, fellowship visibility |
| Fri | Follow up **one** engaged thread only (warm leads; respect wait rules) |
| Sat–Sun | Inbound only or optional public snippet |

**Guardrails:** No cold DMs to high-inbox founders · email with one hook > generic DM · nurture warm leads per table below · details in `scripts/bureau/gtm-route.mjs`

**Partner-seeking:** Nas Solopreneur Fellowship + similar = visibility for **marketer/GTM partner**, not funding-only pitch. Keep application high-level; demo on call.

## Positioning (never drift)

- Neutral DePIN **bureau** — friendly helper, second read not replacement
- Public sample reads on open APIs + signed device evidence + `verify-device` API
- **Not** an earnings aggregator, **not** Yearn/Plaid framing, **no token**, no custody
- Genesis Score = optional reference label, not headline
- Never accuse fraud proved — "patterns worth cross-checking", registry hygiene, economic concentration
